data.general: You are likely to feel a sense of restlessness today, Karka, as Mars in house 10 sparks a desire for action and competition. However, the Moon in house 12 may also make you feel a bit withdrawn or introspective, so try to balance your energy levels. Your focus should be on taking calculated risks to achieve your goals.
data.luck: Your luck is neutral today, but with Mercury in house 11, you may receive some unexpected news or opportunities that can positively impact your life.
data.scope: The scope of your current projects is likely to expand today, Karka, as Jupiter in house 12 brings a sense of growth and expansion. However, Saturn in house 9 may also make you feel a bit limited or restricted, so try to find ways to overcome these obstacles.
data.study: You may feel a bit mentally scattered today, Karka, but with Mercury in house 11, you can still make progress on your studies. Focus on breaking down complex tasks into smaller, manageable chunks.
data.love: Romantically, you may feel a bit disconnected from your partner today, Karka, as the Moon in house 12 can make you feel introspective. Try to communicate openly and honestly with your partner to resolve any issues.
data.travel: Travel plans may be delayed or disrupted today, Karka, as Rahu in house 8 can bring unexpected twists and turns. Be flexible and prepared for any last-minute changes.
